subcodes.first_line: The heart of this servant present was gladdened upon beholding your letter, was uplifted by your remembrance, and was expanded through your love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فرح قلب العبد الحاضر بمشاهده کتابکم و استفرح بذکرکم و انبسط من حبکم
subcodes.subjects: @promotion of commerce and industry, @war and peace, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
